title: Pan-Fried Banana Cakes
description: A simple dessert recipe using mashed bananas and a touch of buttery goodness. Perfect for a sweet treat any time of the year.
instructions: Preheat the pan over medium heat.
In a large bowl, mix together mashed bananas and fluffy egg.
Add buttery and stir to combine.
Add stir flour and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Using a spoon, drop small portions of the batter into the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on the first side, until the edges start to brown.
Flip the cakes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until golden brown.
